Done.
Generated files:
  values.csv   -> 用来画函数曲线
  relerr.csv   -> 用来画相对误差分布

Maximum relative errors (vs direct_q):
  direct_f   : 0.00166215528512566230758225649473226855
  expand_f   : 85830688476657028876913637177542832
  horner_f   : 8344650268563877807477714725594442
  direct_d   : 5.4604665782473599316454189971490201e-16
  expand_d   : 195399252334242752369503596.960010082
  horner_d   : 115463194561143444581979398.61273323
  direct_q   : 0
  expand_q   : 246519031.881837690768628274417098403
  horner_q   : 52000109.4985126378965075266348566966

Note:
  x = 1 时真值为 0，所以相对误差无定义，CSV 中会写成 nan。
  quad 使用 __float128，需要 GCC/Clang + libquadmath。
